function.name: scripts_list
function.description: List MagickMonkey-managed userscript / Tampermonkey / Greasemonkey / browser user script .ts/.js files in the Gist (excludes generated entry and rules JSON). Returns filenames, byte lengths, and indexed userscript metadata when available.

function.name: scripts_runtime_summary
function.description: Return routing hints and runtime/preset capability summary for MagickMonkey-managed userscript authoring: usage boundaries, GM_*/GME_* (including GME_registerWebMcpTool / page WebMCP), integrationPaths (HTTP MCP vs page WebMCP vs extension Agent), OTA publish policy tools, constants, and authoring constraints. Call before generating script content.

function.name: scripts_get
function.description: Read one MagickMonkey-managed userscript file for Tampermonkey or browser user scripts by exact Gist filename.

function.name: scripts_search
function.description: Search MagickMonkey-managed userscript / Tampermonkey / Greasemonkey / browser user script files in the Gist and return compact line-level matches with bounded context. Prefer this before scripts_get to reduce token usage.

filename.description: Optional exact Gist filename to search within.

function.name: scripts_find
function.description: Find MagickMonkey-managed userscript files by filename, userscript @name, @description, @match, and index aliases/keywords. Prefer this when the user describes a script naturally and the exact filename is unknown. Requires magickmonkey.scripts.index.json; if it is missing or unreadable, call scripts_index_rebuild and retry.

function.name: scripts_snippet
function.description: Read a bounded line range from one MagickMonkey-managed userscript / Tampermonkey script file instead of returning the full file.

function.name: scripts_upsert
function.description: Create, add, install, or replace a MagickMonkey-managed userscript file for Tampermonkey, Greasemonkey, or browser user scripts in the Gist. Before writing userscript content, read existing files for updates, propose and confirm header metadata in most cases, especially activation mode, @match domains/path patterns, and @run-at timing, then validate header sanity and syntax when possible; do not default to broad *://*/* scope unless explicitly requested, and never include API keys in script content.

function.name: scripts_replace
function.description: Replace text in one MagickMonkey-managed userscript / Tampermonkey script file server-side. Use expectedCount for safety; avoids full-file get/upsert for small edits.

function.name: scripts_patch
function.description: Apply structured exact-match patch operations to one MagickMonkey-managed userscript / Tampermonkey script file server-side. Use for local edits without transferring the whole file.

function.name: scripts_batch_patch
function.description: Apply structured exact-match patch operations across multiple MagickMonkey-managed userscript / Tampermonkey script files and write them in one Gist update. Use for related multi-file edits.

atomic.description: Reserved for compatibility; batch writes are prepared before the single Gist update.

function.name: scripts_validate
function.description: Validate one MagickMonkey-managed userscript file for Tampermonkey or browser user scripts without returning full content. Checks userscript header sanity.

function.name: scripts_index_rebuild
function.description: Rebuild and persist magickmonkey.scripts.index.json from current managed userscript files, preserving aliases/keywords already present in the index.

function.name: scripts_index_update_metadata
function.description: Update human-maintained search metadata for one managed userscript in magickmonkey.scripts.index.json. Derived fields such as @name, @description, @version, @match, and @run-at still come from the script file.

function.name: scripts_delete
function.description: Delete a MagickMonkey-managed userscript file for Tampermonkey or browser user scripts from the Gist.

function.name: scripts_rename
function.description: Rename a MagickMonkey-managed userscript / Tampermonkey script file inside the Gist (read old content -> upsert new filename -> delete old filename).

fromFilename.description: Existing managed script file name in the Gist (e.g. old.ts)

toFilename.description: New managed script file name in the Gist (e.g. hello.ts)

function.name: scripts_ota_publish_stable
function.description: Publish a managed userscript to stable: write releases/{file}@{version} snapshot and set OTA policy stage=stable with autoUpgrade=true. Requires valid @version in the script header.

function.name: scripts_ota_lock_version
function.description: Fleet-lock a managed userscript to a semver (defaults to header @version). Stable clients pin to the matching releases snapshot.

version.description: Explicit semver; defaults to @version from the script header

function.name: scripts_ota_unlock_version
function.description: Remove fleet version lock from a managed userscript OTA policy.
